summary: Frontend-only verification of 4 visual bug fixes on Aurrum Intelligence landing page. All 4 bug fixes CONFIRMED working. Regression checks pass. No console errors.

issues: Fib percentage labels render at x=1006 in a 1090-wide viewBox with preserveAspectRatio='none'; they render in DOM but visually blend near the AURRUM watermark on the right. Consider increasing fill opacity or moving watermark. Not blocking.

BUG1_navbar_logo_flush_left.evidence: nav-logo boundingBox x=0, y=0, w=320, h=80. Screenshot shows AURRUM + INTELLIGENCE wordmark clearly legible at extreme left.

BUG2_desks_side_by_side.evidence: 3 desk blocks at top=96 each, diff=0 (well under 5px). Texts: NEW YORK, LONDON, TOKYO all present and visible on single row.

BUG3_elliott_labels_not_overlapping.evidence: Peaks: (1) y=120 above dot@130, (3) y=35 above dot@45, (5) y=12 above dot@22, (B) y=55 above dot@65. Troughs: (2) y=183 below dot@165, (4) y=113 below dot@95, (A) y=118 below dot@100, (C) y=148 below dot@130. Screenshot confirms clean separation.

BUG4_fib_percentages_at_end_of_line.evidence: All 7 fib labels found in SVG DOM at x=1006: 0.0%, 23.6%, 38.2%, 50.0%, 61.8%, 78.6%, 100.0%. Bounding boxes non-empty (~45-54 wide). 61.8% has bolder fontWeight/opacity as designed.

REGRESSION.note: data-testid='aurrum-landing' wrapper existence not explicitly asserted but page loads and all hero testids render.

critical_code_review_comments: ElliottWaveFib.jsx: SVG uses preserveAspectRatio='none' with viewBox 1090x240 — stretching may distort labels on very wide screens; consider 'xMidYMid meet' if aesthetic distortion becomes an issue.
Hero watermark logo overlaps with the Fib percentage label region at the right; visually acceptable but reduces label contrast.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 confirmed all 4 visual regressions fixed. Navbar logo flush-left OK, 3 desks in single row OK, Elliott Wave labels positioned above/below correctly, Fib % labels rendered at x=1006. Wave animation has ~5s delay — always wait >=6s after scrolling into view before asserting on Fib text elements.
